name: South32 Limited
description: South32 Limited is a globally diversified mining and metals company headquartered in Perth, Western Australia. Spun out of BHP Billiton in 2015, the company operates a portfolio of high-quality assets across Australia, Southern Africa, and the Americas. South32 focuses on the production of commodities essential for a low-carbon future, including copper, zinc, lead, silver, nickel, aluminium, and alumina. The company is committed to responsible resource development, aiming to realize the potential of its assets while delivering sustainable value to its shareholders, partners, and the communities in which it operates.
